title: cupania mutabilis var. coriacea
intro: Cupania mutabilis var. coriacea is a variety of the Cupania mutabilis plant, belonging to the family Sapindaceae, which is a type of tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Cupania mutabilis var. coriacea include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even support the treatment of skin conditions and wounds. Cupania mutabilis var. coriacea is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can also be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves.
